items.title: Bowen: Why Ukraine remains defiant and does not feel close to defeat
items.dek: This month marks four gruelling years since the full‑scale invasion began and a genuine ceasefire still feels far from assured
items.body: This month marks four gruelling years since the full‑scale invasion began and a genuine ceasefire still feels far from assured

items.title: Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' orders
items.dek: Four men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders.
items.body: Four men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders.
